latin: Monachus, qui palaestram clam exercebat, personam induit et in arenam intravit. 'sub luna pugnabo,' clamavit, 'quia pauperibus cibum emere volo!'

questions.prompt: Why does the monk wrestle in secret?
questions.target: To buy food for the poor
choices: To buy food for the poor

questions.prompt: What does the monk wear to disguise himself?

translation: A monk, who was secretly practicing wrestling, put on a mask and entered the arena. 'I will fight under the moon,' he shouted, 'because I want to buy food for the poor!'
